'''Spadda''' was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] who lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Aikhibba]]. The [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Uxbeg]] was set to deliver a load of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] from the royal governor of the [[Thokosia system/Legends|Thokosia system]] to Spadda, but [[Lo Khan]] intercepted the shipment and delivered it himself. Spadda shortchanged Khan on the delivery fee, but the payout was still sufficient to set him up for life.
